rulings.Case Title: 4160-64 25TH STREET, LLC VS. PAUL MADGWICK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Oct-26-20, 2020 line 3 . PLAINTIFF 4160-64 25TH STREET, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication is transferred to department 304 be heard on October 27, 2020 by the honorable Anne-Christine Massullo at 2:00 p.m. per the order of the presiding judge. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC VS. JODY TELLIER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Oct-26-20, 2020 line 1 . PLAINTIFF HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR. No Form UD-101 on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GENE FONG VS. NERCY ESCOBEDO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Oct-26-20, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF GENE FONG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication is OFF CALENDAR. No Form UD-101 on file. The Court also notes that that the motion was signed on October 20, 2020. If the motion was served on October 20, 2020 electronically there is insufficient notice, i.e. 5 days plus 2 court days. = (501/CFH)
